issues.msg: Notify auto-audit (notify-auto-audit.yml) has failed 3 consecutive runs on main. Latest: https://github.com/Eiasash/Geriatrics/actions/runs/29424710997. If this is expected, add to WORKFLOW_FAILURE_ALLOWLIST in scripts/probe.py.

Notify auto-audit (notify-auto-audit.yml) has failed 3 consecutive runs on main. Latest: https://github.com/Eiasash/InternalMedicine/actions/runs/29423568040. If this is expected, add to WORKFLOW_FAILURE_ALLOWLIST in scripts/probe.py.
Pnimit deployed bundle has unrecognized `t` value(s): ['2026-Jun']
issues.body:
`data/questions.json` on the live deploy contains 1 `t` value(s) not declared in this probe's `CANONICAL_SESSION_TAGS` or `NON_CANONICAL_TAGS`: ['2026-Jun'].

Decide handling before this accumulates silently:
- New exam session → add tag to `CANONICAL_SESSION_TAGS` AND create the matching canonical file under `scripts/exam_audit/canonical/`.
- New non-canonical source (textbook, AI model, etc.) → add to `NON_CANONICAL_TAGS` so the sampler skips it correctly.

Sample-eligible this run: 947/1706 questions. Unknown-tag questions are excluded from sampling.
